name: Trello REST API
description: Trello REST API provides a REST API for programmatic access to its features. Use it to automate workflows and integrate with other services.

capabilities.name: actions
capabilities.description: Manage actions — create reaction for action, update an action, update a comment action. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: applications
capabilities.description: Manage applications — get application's compliance data. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: batch
capabilities.description: Manage batch — batch requests. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: boards
capabilities.description: Manage boards — create a board, create a label on a board, create a list on a board. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: cards
capabilities.description: Manage cards — create a new card, create attachment on card, create checklist on a card. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: checklists
capabilities.description: Manage checklists — create a checklist, create checkitem on checklist, update a checklist. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: custom_fields
capabilities.description: Manage custom fields — create a new custom field on a board, add option to custom field dropdown, update a custom field definition. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: emoji
capabilities.description: Manage emoji — list available emoji. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: enterprises
capabilities.description: Manage enterprises — create an auth token for an enterprise, decline enterprisejoinrequests from one organization or a bulk list of organizations, transfer an organization to an enterprise. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: labels
capabilities.description: Manage labels — create a label, update a label, update a field on a label. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: lists
capabilities.description: Manage lists — create a new list, archive all cards in list, move all cards in list. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: members
capabilities.description: Manage members — upload new boardbackground for member, create star for board, create a new custom board background. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.
